summary: The diff implements custom pan/zoom interactive maps instead of Leaflet library as specified. It includes edit/delete functionality and hover tooltips, but does not use Leaflet.js or OpenStreetMap tiles as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace static map images with interactive Leaflet maps using OpenStreetMap tiles
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses custom pan/zoom logic with no evidence of Leaflet library integration or OpenStreetMap tile layers. The maps appear to be custom-built canvas/div overlays.

missing_requirements.requirement: Map tiles properly attribute OpenStreetMap contributors
missing_requirements.reason: No OpenStreetMap attribution is present in the map implementations, as they don't use actual OSM tiles.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom pan and drag functionality for maps
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation includes custom mouse drag, pan state management (isDragging, dragStart, pan coordinates), which was not requested. The requirement only specified zoom functionality, not pan/drag.

hallucinated_features.description: Auto-fit bounds calculation to center on pins
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation includes complex useEffect logic to automatically calculate bounds and center the map on existing pins. While REQ-5 mentions automatically adjust their view, this elaborate auto-centering with zoom calculation was not explicitly specified.
A Maximize2 icon is imported and appears to be part of zoom controls, but was not mentioned in REQ-6 which only specified zoom in/out buttons.
